nodes.summary: hooks_fast.sh accepts --keep-going flag and QUALITY_HOOKS_KEEP_GOING=true env var
hooks_strict.sh accepts the same flag and env var with same semantics
hooks_run.sh accepts and forwards keep-going to both child phases
Pre-commit fail-fast invariant in keep-going mode (file mutations preclude downstream aggregation)
Aggregate every downstream fast-phase check after pre-commit succeeds
Aggregate every strict-phase check
Consolidated summary block with stable marker line and per-check status
Exit 0 only when every executed check passed; non-zero otherwise
Default behavior byte-identical to pre-change scripts for non-gated checks
--help documents flag, env vars, gating behaviors for all three scripts
Path-gate infra-validate + infra-contract-test-fast on changed-path scope; QUALITY_HOOKS_FORCE_FULL=true override
Phase-gate quality-spec-pr-ready on SPEC_READY: true; QUALITY_HOOKS_FORCE_FULL=true override
Remove duplicate quality-docs-lint and quality-test-pyramid run_cmd calls; rely on pre-commit; warn if pre-commit missing
Step 5 implementation skill directs per-slice gate to test-unit-all and frames quality-hooks-fast as pre-PR gate only
No shell injection via captured output; no widening of fs permissions; temp cleanup via EXIT trap
Per-check log_info on start; tail re-emission on failure; end-of-run quality_hooks_keep_going_total metric
Skip metrics quality_hooks_skip_total with phase/check/reason labels; log_info skipping line
EXIT trap and cleanup on signal; subsequent checks do not execute after fatal signal
Discoverable via --help and via make help doc-comments for QUALITY_HOOKS_KEEP_GOING
QUALITY_HOOKS_FORCE_FULL discoverable via --help and make help; documented in operations doc
Default invocation preserves fail-fast behavior and emits no summary marker
--keep-going flag aggregates all downstream failures and emits summary block
QUALITY_HOOKS_KEEP_GOING=true env var triggers keep-going equivalently
Pre-commit failure aborts before any downstream check executes
hooks_run.sh keep-going invokes strict only when fast pre-commit passed; combined exit aggregates
--help mentions --keep-going, QUALITY_HOOKS_KEEP_GOING, and QUALITY_HOOKS_FORCE_FULL for all three scripts
Helper unit tests verify aggregation, tail re-emission, env-var tail-length override, default-path bypass
make recipes propagate QUALITY_HOOKS_KEEP_GOING through to the script
docs/spec-only commit triggers hooks_fast that skips infra-validate and infra-contract-test-fast with skip metric
infra-touching commit triggers hooks_fast that runs both infra checks; no skip metric
QUALITY_HOOKS_FORCE_FULL=true forces both infra checks and quality-spec-pr-ready regardless of gating
SPEC_READY: false on a codex/* branch causes quality-spec-pr-ready to skip with reason spec-not-ready
SPEC_READY: true on a codex/* branch causes quality-spec-pr-ready to run normally
hooks_fast.sh contains no separate run_cmd lines for quality-docs-lint or quality-test-pyramid; no double execution observed
Step 5 SKILL.md contains the per-slice gate normative directive and frames quality-hooks-fast as pre-PR-only
